name: Bureau of Indian Standards Certification (ISI Mark / CRS)
risk_if_missing: Goods detained at customs. Cannot clear without valid BIS registration. BIS registration required before import. Penalty up to INR 5 lakh per consignment.
process_summary: Apply for BIS CRS registration via bis.gov.in. Requires test reports from BIS-recognized lab, manufacturing unit details, authorized Indian representative. Processing time: 4-8 weeks. Annual surveillance audits required.

name: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India License
risk_if_missing: Import not permitted without FSSAI import license. Goods rejected at port, destroyed or re-exported at importer's cost. Each consignment needs FSSAI NOC.
process_summary: Obtain FSSAI Import License via foscos.fssai.gov.in. Submit application with food category details, manufacturing unit certification, lab test reports as per FSSAI standards. Processing time: 2-4 weeks. Each consignment requires separate FSSAI NOC from port health officer.

name: Wireless Planning and Coordination Wing Equipment Type Approval
risk_if_missing: Import of wireless equipment without ETA is prohibited. Goods seized by customs. Criminal proceedings under Indian Telegraph Act possible.
process_summary: Apply for Equipment Type Approval (ETA) from WPC wing of DoT. Submit technical specifications, frequency details, test reports from recognized lab. Processing time: 6-12 weeks. Temporary import possible with demo license.

name: Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation Import License
risk_if_missing: Import of drugs and medical devices without CDSCO license is a criminal offence under Drugs and Cosmetics Act. Goods confiscated and destroyed.
process_summary: Apply for import license from CDSCO via cdscoonline.gov.in. Requires registration of foreign manufacturer, product registration, GMP certificate, free sale certificate from country of origin. Processing time: 3-6 months for new registrations.

name: Plant Quarantine Clearance (Phytosanitary)
risk_if_missing: Consignment fumigated, quarantined, or rejected. Additional inspection charges. Potential destruction of goods if pest infestation detected.
process_summary: Import requires phytosanitary certificate from exporting country's plant protection authority. Apply for Plant Quarantine clearance at port of entry. NPPO inspection mandatory. Additional fumigation may be required at Indian port.

name: Bureau of Energy Efficiency Star Label
risk_if_missing: Cannot sell in Indian market without BEE star label. Product may be allowed to enter but cannot be sold to consumers.
process_summary: Register product with BEE via beeindia.gov.in. Submit test reports from BIS/NABL accredited lab. Star rating assigned based on energy efficiency parameters. Registration valid for 1-2 years.

name: Petroleum and Explosives Safety Organisation License
risk_if_missing: Import, storage and transport of petroleum products without PESO license is a criminal offence. Heavy fines and imprisonment.
process_summary: Obtain PESO license for import, storage and handling. Submit storage facility details, safety measures, fire NOC. License required before import. Processing time: 4-8 weeks.
